_doc: Cross-session memory for Claude. Updated by skills as they work. Read by /seo-brain at session start (Step 0c). Git-tracked so it survives machines. Schema is intentionally minimal — Pending Commitments + Activity Log carry the heavier per-action audit trail; this file is just the 'where we are' pointer.

lastSession.lastBatch: ship: aeo-agency-pricing-b2b-saas-2026 (2,869 words, live) — first dedicated pricing-intent piece in our index

currentSprint.name: AEO Pricing live — pair-byline queued, GSC measurement window pending
currentSprint.summary: 5-page AEO refresh sprint shipped end-to-end. P0 = AEO guide (intro rewritten as extractable stats block + Key Takeaways box + new strategies H2 + metaTitle updated to head terms 'Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Strategies & Best Practices 2026'). P1 = Webflow A/B testing (definition prepend + 5-step how-to H2 + 3 PAA Q&As + corrected the Enterprise-only framing now that Optimize is verified as a paid add-on on ALL Webflow plans, $299/mo standard). P2 = Webflow vs Wix Studio (pricing anchor in short-answer, pricing breakdown H2, e-commerce H2, When-to-choose summary box). P3 = Share of Answer (formula block H3, Sarah Evans 'answer share' synonym callout verified, SoA-vs-SoV promoted to dedicated H2). P4 = Best AEO Agencies (methodology expanded 4→6 criteria, H2 renamed to AEO-friendly 'How we evaluated these agencies'). LoudFace stayed at #1 (methodology block was already present above the list per the spec's conditional). All 5 live confirmed via curl. 5 Activity Log rows written. Scripts saved at scripts/refresh-{slug}.mjs for audit.
currentSprint.nextPlannedAction: STRATEGIC PIVOT 2026-05-20: LoudFace repositioning from 'Webflow + AEO agency' to 'B2B SaaS organic growth agency, stack-agnostic.' All new content targets organic-discovery framings (AEO, content, SEO, AI search). Existing Webflow content stays live to decay naturally. No new Webflow-themed content. Brain + KB updated (KB entry: 'Webflow is becoming a capability, not a category', 365b63394d10816fb7cad85317ba01bd). 3 Patterns Registry kill rows added for Webflow lanes. Next ship: pair-byline 'Pricing as Positioning' (already queued, on-strategy under new positioning — agency-pricing transparency is squarely 'organic growth agency' territory, not Webflow). Pair-ship deadline 2026-05-24 to honor 1-in-3-4 saturation cap. After that, new listicle candidates should be re-evaluated under new positioning — likely 'Best Organic Growth Agencies for B2B SaaS 2026' as the next pattern, vs the deferred early-stage SEO listicle. Then hold for the June 2-9 GSC measurement window: re-check 5 refresh-sprint URLs + just-shipped agencies listicle + wedge byline + AEO pricing post. Validation criteria: refresh sprint ≥3/5 URLs climb 4+ positions; pair-ships = brand mention WoW compounds. Note for /pricing follow-up (deferred from Path B decision): consider adding tier-band disclosure ($5K Solo / $8-12K Dual / $15-18K+ Scale) to reinforce the AEO Pricing post's transparency positioning. Outstanding refdomain outreach: contra.com DR 83, onyamagazine.com DR 57 dofollow, callsphere.ai, icypeas.com DR 45 (skip topwebflowagencies.com — off-strategy under new positioning).
